subcodes.title: Words spoken during filming of motion picture on 1912-06-18
subcodes.first_line: Glad-tidings, glad-tidings! The sun of Truth has arisen! Glad-tidings, glad-tidings! The New Jerusalem has descended from heaven!
subcodes.first_line_orig: مژده باد مژده باد که نور شمس حقیقت طلوع نمود مژده باد مژده باد که صهیون برقص
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @return of Christ; second coming of Christ, @universal peace; world unity
